summary.xray_call: Real runtime with visible prompt layers.
summary.verdict: This repo behaves like a runtime-framework with real implementation and prompt/config behavior surfaces; the call is grounded in runtime, graph, and prompt evidence together.

missing_runtime_pieces: Prompt-like assets exist, but runtime code does not appear to load them directly.

real_implementation: Runtime-backed behavior is supported by code and graph evidence in entrypoints, services, or stateful modules.
State or memory behavior is backed by parser-detected runtime/storage evidence.
prompt_config_structure: Tool-specific behavior layers are packaged for multiple AI ecosystems.
Prompt, rule, and skill files still materially shape visible behavior.
Config and manifest files contribute to how the runtime and prompts are wired together.
presentation_marketing_layer: README-level framing contributes to the product story users see first.

reasons: final-state confidence derived after constraint resolution

contradictions: Prompt-like assets exist, but runtime code does not appear to load them directly.

artifacts.summary: Skill definition or skill-like instruction source in .agents/skills/code-change-verification/SKILL.md.
artifacts.source_snippet: Ensure work is only marked complete after formatting, linting, type checking, and tests pass. Use this skill when changes affect runtime code, tests, or build/test configuration. You can skip it for docs-only or repository metadata unless a user asks for the full stack.

artifacts.title: final-release-review
artifacts.summary: Skill definition or skill-like instruction source in .agents/skills/final-release-review/SKILL.md.
artifacts.source_snippet: Use this skill when validating the latest release candidate commit (default tip of `origin/main`) for release. It guides you to fetch remote tags, pick the previous release tag, and thoroughly inspect the `BASE_TAG...TARGET` diff for breaking changes, introduced bugs/regressions, improvement opportunities, and release risks.

artifacts.source_snippet: Use this skill whenever coverage needs assessment or improvement (coverage regressions, failing thresholds, or user requests for stronger tests). artifacts.source_snippet: instructions="You are a helpful agent that can tell the weather of a given city.", | 1. 你可以将其添加到智能体的 `instructions` 中。这也称为“系统提示词”或“开发者消息”。系统提示词可以是静态字符串，也可以是接收上下文并输出字符串的动态函数。这是处理始终有用信息的常见策略（例如，用户姓名或当前日期）。 | 2. 在调用 `Runner.run` 函数时将其加入 `input`。这与 `instructions` 策略类似，但允许你的消息在[指令链](https://cdn.openai.com/spec/model-spec-2024-05-08.html#follow-the-chain-of-command)中的优先级更低。
